Handpicked from Devgad

Farm Fresh Devgad Alphonso Mangoes Delivered to Your Doorstep

Experience the authentic sweetness of naturally ripened GI-Tagged Devgad Hapus, sourced directly from our sun-drenched estates to your dining table.

eco

100% Organic

Naturally Ripened Process

Pure Excellence in Every Bite

We maintain the highest standards of quality from the blossom until the fruit reaches you.

sunny

Naturally Ripened

No calcium carbide or ripening agents. We let time and sunlight do the magic.

agriculture

Direct From Farmers

Sourced straight from Devgad orchards, ensuring fair prices and freshness.

health_and_safety

No Chemicals

Chemical-free processing and packaging keeps natural flavor intact.

verified

Premium Quality

Each mango is manually inspected for size, texture, and aroma.

local_shipping

Fast Delivery

Delivery within 24-48 hours across major cities.

volunteer_activism

Trusted Legacy

Serving mango connoisseurs for over three decades with consistency.

Chemically Ripened Mango

These mangoes show uniformly yellow colour.

1

Look & feel hard. They aren't ripened, its a biochemical reaction.

2

Hard on your nose when you smell it. Non aromatic smell.

3

Wrinkled, yet green, means they were harvested immature.

4

Original Alphonso Mango

1

This Mangoes show gradients in yellows & green color.

2

Look and feel soft if they are naturally ripened in grass hay.

3

The sweet, strong fragrance of Alphonso noticable from distance.

4

Should not show wrinkles. If they are over ripe, they show wrinkles.

Tradition Rooted in Soil

Founded by three generations of farmers, The Orchard is our heritage. We cultivate over 5,000 trees with natural methods.

Our mission is simple: preserve Alphonso integrity while giving customers a truly royal, chemical-free taste.

35+

Years of Legacy

15k+

Happy Families

GI-Tagged Authentic Source

The aroma of these mangoes filled my entire apartment. They are perfectly sweet and nostalgic.
